properties.name: spring.multitenancy.default-tenant
properties.description: The tenant identifier used as a fallback when no tenant can be resolved and {@link #requireTenant} is {@code false}. Defaults to {@code "public"}.

properties.name: spring.multitenancy.enabled
properties.description: Whether multitenancy support is enabled. Defaults to {@code true}.

properties.name: spring.multitenancy.require-tenant
properties.description:
Whether requests without a resolvable tenant identifier should be rejected with HTTP {@code 400 Bad Request}. Defaults to {@code true}.

Set to {@code false} to allow requests without a tenant (e.g., for public endpoints that should fall back to the {@link #defaultTenant}).

properties.name: spring.multitenancy.resolver-type
properties.description: Which built-in {@link io.github.saumilp.starters.multitenancy.resolver.TenantResolver} implementation to register automatically. Defaults to {@link ResolverType#HEADER}.

properties.name: spring.multitenancy.strategy
properties.description:
The multitenancy isolation strategy. Supported values:
  • {@code "schema"} — each tenant has a dedicated database schema (default)
  • {@code "database"} — each tenant has a dedicated database (requires a custom {@link io.github.saumilp.starters.multitenancy.hibernate.SchemaMultiTenantConnectionProvider})

properties.name: spring.multitenancy.tenant-header-name
properties.description: The HTTP header name used by {@link io.github.saumilp.starters.multitenancy.resolver.HeaderTenantResolver} to read the tenant identifier. Defaults to {@code X-Tenant-Id}.
